scripts.prep: copyfiles analytics.js bilo.html bilo.css dist && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('dist/bilo.html','dist/index.html')" && concat node_modules/material-design-lite/material.min.js node_modules/seedrandom/seedrandom.min.js > dist/lib.js
scripts.build-js: browserify src/playground.ts -p [tsify] -o dist/bundle.js && npx terser dist/bundle.js -c -m -o dist/bundle.js
scripts.write-ts-snapshots: browserify src/write_ts_snapshots.ts -p [tsify] -s writeSnapshots -o dist/write_snapshots.js --exclude fs --exclude path && node scripts/run_write_snapshots.js
scripts.write-bilo-snapshot: browserify src/bilo_snapshot_entry.ts -p [tsify] -s biloSnapshot -o dist/bilo_snapshot.js && node scripts/write_bilo_snapshot.js
scripts.build: npm run prep && npm run build-js && npm run build-bilo && npm run build-css && npm run build-html
scripts.watch: npm run prep && concurrently "npm run watch-js" "npm run watch-bilo" "npm run watch-css" "npm run watch-html" "npm run watch-bilo-static"
